subject: Added sourcing scope - does this change my invoice?
snippet: After the last walkthrough we added the primary-suite sourcing onto the dining room project. Does that change what I owe...
body:
Hi Jessica,

After the last walkthrough we added the primary-suite sourcing onto the dining room project. Does that change what I still owe on my current invoice, or will the extra sourcing be billed separately? I want to make sure my balance is squared away before the year-end close.

Thanks,
Grace
